title: SECRETARY CUM PERSONAL ASSISTANT (SINGAPOREAN/PR ONLY)
description:
Reporting Line : Chairman, CEO and Senior Management

Job Responsibilities:

  • Schedule meetings, appointments and perform other secretary and concierge services.
  • Make reservations (including amendments) for air tickets and accommodation bookings.
  • Coordinate with HR in Work Pass and VISA renewals/applications for employees and visiting guests.
  • Answer phone calls, take messages and handle all correspondences.
  • Maintain diaries and minutes of meeting.
  • Remind managers to furnish sales and reports prior to meetings.
  • Send out reminders.
  • Ensure proper filing of documents.
  • Implement and improve procedures for office administrative tasks.
  • Liaise with relevant organizations and clients when needed.
  • Coordinate mailshots and similar publicity tasks.
  • Perform monthly reconciliation of corporate credit card expenses.
  • Meet-and-greet guests.
  • Ensure accurate and timely payment of office bills and/or personal bills if he/she is PA of designated person(s).
  • Look into meals and other dietary requirements when scheduling meetings/events/lunch/dinner.
  • Prepare monthly reports for our Chairman, CEO and/or Senior Management.
  • Ensure office premise (e.g. corridors pantry, rooms and toilets) has been managed properly, neat and tidy.
  • Supervise cleaners, chauffeurs, junior/clerical/temporary staff, consultants and external vendors/workers within office perimeter.
  • PA role only : Run personal errands and manage schedules.
  • PA role only : Keep a record of personal expenses and ensure timely settlement of bills.
  • PA role only : Manage personal banking and financial matters.
  • Other ad-hoc duties when assigned.


Job Requirements:

  • Minimum GCE “O” Level and above with at least 7-10 years of relevant experience.
  • Good command of spoken and written English.
  • Good computer literacy with proficiency in MS-Office and other common software and Apps.
  • Possess a pleasant, responsible and meticulous personality.
  • Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
  • Ability to handle confidential information with care and vigilance.
  • Good communication and planning skills.
  • Ability to work long hours and occasionally, after office hours, on Saturdays and/or public holidays.


We regret that only short-listed candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
PRESTIGE PRODUCTS DISTRIBUTION PTE LTD


Established in 1983 and headquartered in Singapore, Prestige Products Distribution Pte Ltd (the Prestige Group) is a leading distributor, wholesaler and retailer of luxury fragrances and cosmetics in South-East Asia and Australasia. Our products are marketed, distributed and sold through 1,000 counters, stores, perfumeries and other channels in Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Indonesia, Philippines, Australia and New Zealand. At any one time, we employ about 1,000 staff and manage about 40 brands that include Versace, Creed, Kilian, Maison Margiela, Byredo, Prada, Valentino, Maison Francis Kurkdjian, Parfums de Marly, Nishane, Dr Vranjes, Terenzi, Fornasetti, and many more.
For more information, kindly visit our website at www.prestigegrp.co.
postedCompany.name: PRESTIGE PRODUCTS DISTRIBUTION PTE. LTD.
